prompt_text: A bronze candle stand with a small trembling flame in sharp focus at the left foreground, Gao Lingning in the right background in partial focus, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura. She is shown in side profile, motionless and silent, her expression tightly restrained, the candlelight cutting along the bridge of her nose and the line of her jaw while her memory seems about to awaken beneath the stillness. The rest of the room is swallowed by black darkness, interior of an ancient noble chamber barely visible, low-saturation amber candlelight against gray-blue shadow, strong separation of her face from the surrounding room. Cinematic historical drama realism, intimate close-up composition, shallow depth of field, high contrast, subtle film grain, emotionally suspended and cold.
